tfaSecret.title: Two-factor authentication code
tfaSecret.description: If you have enabled two-factor authentication on your SmartRent account, enter the seed secret here.

unitName.title: Unit name
unitName.description: Only necessary if you have multiple units in your SmartRent account. Get the name from the top of the More tab in the SmartRent app.

enableAutoLock.title: Enable auto locking after a delay from the last unlock

autoLockDelayInMinutes.title: Auto lock delay in minutes
autoLockDelayInMinutes.description: The delay in minutes after the last unlock to automatically lock the door.

excludeDevices.title: Exclude devices
excludeDevices.description: List of SmartRent device IDs to exclude from HomeKit. Device IDs are shown in the Homebridge logs at startup.

lowBatteryThreshold.title: Low battery threshold (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.description: Battery percentage at or below which devices report low battery status.

lockPollingInterval.title: Lock polling interval (seconds)
lockPollingInterval.description: How often to poll the lock state via the SmartRent API, in seconds.

temperatureUnit.title: Temperature display unit
temperatureUnit.description: Temperature display unit for thermostats in the Home app.

verboseLogging.title: Verbose logging
verboseLogging.description: Enable verbose debug logging for troubleshooting. Logs detailed WebSocket, API, and device state information.
